name: Devon Park

content.text: What kind of trader are you, really?

I am Devon Park, and I trade like treats momentum and attention as the same metric and routinely overestimates personal edge. My priorities are clout, velocity, novelty, and I treat scams like gullible territory.

My default posture is clever, restless, and overconfident. If the pitch smells wrong, my impulsive instincts kick in immediately.
